title: Hostages
questions: What do you understand by the terms 'to take someone hostage', to kidnap someone, to hold someone to ransom, to abduct someone?
Can you remember any famous cases of any of the above in your country? What happened?
Can you think of any cases of any of the above in other countries around the world? What was the outcome of those situations?
What do you think motivates people to carry out such acts? What do you think they hope to achieve?
Do you think such acts are useful in helping those responsible for them to achieve their goals? Why/not?
What other ways can you suggest for hostage-takers, kidnappers etc. to achieve their aims?
In which cases, if any, do you think acts such as kidnapping, abduction or hostage-taking might be justified?
Can you imagine any extreme situation in which you might be driven to take another person hostage?
How should people who unlawfully deprive others of their freedom be treated when captured?
What difficulties do you think those held captive might face when they are released?
